response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed the video structure: intro talk followed by a musical performance, ending with applause. 2. Identified the song title 'Wishful Garnet' from on-screen text. 3. Researched 'Wishful Garnet Maon Kurosaki lyrics' to find the official original lyrics and structure. 4. Translated the lyrics into English for the 'reference_lyrics_en' field. 5. Mapped the timing: 00:00-01:17 as the introductory scene (no vocal music) and 01:18-05:07 as the song performance scene. 6. Generated the final JSON structure, ensuring all formatting constraints (escaping quotes, line breaks, timestamps) were met.
response.global_summary: This video captures a live birthday performance by the VTuber duo FUWAMOCO. The video begins with an introductory talk, followed by a vocal performance of their original song 'Wishful Garnet' (composed by Maon Kurosaki), and concludes with an outro.

scenes.description: The duo introduces their final song for their birthday festival.
The duo performs 'Wishful Garnet' with choreography. Background text displays the song title and credits.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:

I hope you will be laughing forever... lala...
When I look back at the past, I remember
The light overflowing from the garnet sky
The day reflected in these eyes of mine
Sways beautifully
What do you think?
I made a wish to the sky tinged with red
Please, let this wish come true

I hope you will be laughing
Even if we are apart

I will break them for you
Do not give up, keep moving forward
Because I will always be by your side"
Even when you are depressed or lose confidence
You are there before me
I have been saved so many times

If you feel like you are going to break

That we still do not know together

I want to be the one shining upon you
When you feel like you are about to cry
I want you to look this way

The one who loves you is surely
Always thinking of you"
